query:
CREATE TABLE `correction_requests` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`attendanceRecordId` int NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`reason` text NOT NULL,
	`correctionType` enum('clock_in','clock_out','cancel') NOT NULL,
	`newClockInTime` timestamp,
	`newClockOutTime` timestamp,
	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`approvedBy` int,
	`approvedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_attendanceRecordId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`attendanceRecordId`) REFERENCES `attendance_records`(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_employeeId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`employeeId`) REFERENCES `employee_master`(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_approvedBy_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`approvedBy`) REFERENCES `employee_master`(`id`)
)
command:

	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_attendanceRecordId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`attendanceRecordId`) REFERENCES `attendance_records`(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_employeeId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`employeeId`) REFERENCES `employee_master`(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `correction_requests_approvedBy_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`approvedBy`) REFERENCES `employee_master`(`id`)
